events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: unoiled forms are a fail — ACI 347 requires a release agent on form contact surfaces before placement, and without it the concrete will bond to the forms, causing surface tearing/honeycombing on stripping and damage to reusable form material. Corrective action (clean and apply release agent, then re-inspect) is required before concrete placement proceeds.
